fact_base: Annual revenue per customer anchor: MXN 36,000.00.
methodology_summary: Blended market model using top-down demand assumptions and bottom-up reachable-customer heuristics.
key_assumptions: Annual price per customer assumed at MXN 36,000.00.
Target customer ratio set at 18% of the total addressable customer base.
Serviceable customer ratio set at 35% of target customers.
Obtainable customer ratio set at 4% of serviceable customers.
Bottom-up model uses 1400 reachable customers and 22% expected close rate.
assumptions: Annual price per customer assumed at MXN 36,000.00.
Target customer ratio set at 18% of the total addressable customer base.
Serviceable customer ratio set at 35% of target customers.
Obtainable customer ratio set at 4% of serviceable customers.
Bottom-up model uses 1400 reachable customers and 22% expected close rate.
implementation_risks: Top-down demand may look larger than what a founder can actually reach in the first 90 days.
Market attractiveness can degrade quickly if trust-building channels underperform.
